query: SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.store_id, s.name as store_name FROM product_categories pc JOIN stores s ON s.id = pc.store_id WHERE LOWER(pc.name) LIKE '%deli%' AND LOWER(s.name) LIKE '%spar%';
